ItacPersonItem.Notes: De` Sommi`s membership of the Invaghiti is disputed. Maylender states that he was refused membership for being Jewish (Maylender 1926-30, iii, p. 364). Iain Fenlon suggests that he was a member since he is described as `nostro scrittore` in payments made out to him by the academy in 1568 (Fenlon 1980, 37).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
